notes: Foundation plan is at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md. Jules tasks read that file directly from the repo. Gemini tasks reference it via @ syntax. Phase 0 gate must complete before dispatching any tasks.

phases.name: Gate — Create GitHub repo and push

tasks.title: Install cc-starter into local Maven + init repo files
tasks.gemini_command: cd /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas && gemini --yolo -p "@docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md You are implementing the micro-saas ecosystem foundation. The full plan is in the file above. Execute ONLY Task 1 exactly as written. Working directory: /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas. Steps: (1) Run 'cd /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/cross-cutting && mvn install -DskipTests -q' — verify BUILD SUCCESS. (2) Create .gitignore with the exact content shown in Task 1 Step 4. (3) Create README.md with the exact content shown in Task 1 Step 5. (4) Run 'cd /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas && git add .gitignore README.md && git commit -m \"chore: initialise micro-saas ecosystem repo\"'. Verify: ls ~/.m2/repository/com/crosscutting/cc-starter/ shows 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT. Do NOT create any Java, SQL, or Docker files yet. Do NOT touch any files other than .gitignore and README.md."

tasks.title: Create cc-platform local dev environment (Docker Compose)
tasks.gemini_command: cd /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas && gemini --yolo -p "@docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md You are implementing the micro-saas ecosystem foundation. (2) Create infra/docker-compose.yml with exact content from Task 2 Step 2. (3) Create infra/postgres/init.sql with exact content from Task 2 Step 3. (4) Copy realm-export.json: cp /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/cross-cutting/cc-platform/keycloak/realm-export.json infra/keycloak/realm-export.json. (5) Create infra/litellm-config.yaml with exact content from Task 2 Step 5. (6) Run 'cd infra && docker compose up -d && sleep 10 && docker compose ps'. (8) Run 'cd /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas && git add infra/ && git commit -m \"chore: add cc-platform local dev environment\"'. Do NOT create any Java or Maven files. Do NOT modify anything outside infra/."
tasks.acceptance: docker compose ps shows 5 services Up; \dt tenant.* shows schemas

tasks.title: Database migrations V1–V5
tasks.gemini_command: cd /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas && gemini --yolo -p "@docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md You are implementing the micro-saas ecosystem foundation. Steps: (1) Create all 5 SQL migration files in nexus-hub/backend/src/main/resources/db/migration/ with EXACT content from Task 4 Steps 1-5. (2) Apply migrations: cd nexus-hub/backend && mvn flyway:migrate -Dflyway.url=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/cc -Dflyway.user=cc -Dflyway.password=cc -Dflyway.schemas=tenant -Dflyway.defaultSchema=tenant. Expect 'Successfully applied 5 migrations'. (4) git add nexus-hub/backend/src/main/resources/db/ && git commit -m 'feat(nexus-hub): database migrations V1-V5'. Do NOT create any Java source files."
tasks.acceptance: flyway:migrate reports 5 applied; \dt tenant.* shows 5 tables

phases.name: App Registry + Event Bus — parallel Jules tasks after t4

tasks.title: App Registry — EcosystemApp entity, service, controller, TDD
tasks.jules_session_prompt: You are implementing the Nexus Hub app registry for the micro-saas ecosystem. The repo is Shashank2577/micro-saas. The complete implementation plan is in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md. Read it, then implement exactly Task 5: App Registry. This includes: (1) NexusHubTestBase.java at nexus-hub/backend/src/test/java/com/microsaas/nexushub/NexusHubTestBase.java, (2) test-init.sql at nexus-hub/backend/src/test/resources/db/test-init.sql, (3) EcosystemAppServiceTest.java at nexus-hub/backend/src/test/java/com/microsaas/nexushub/app/EcosystemAppServiceTest.java, (4) EcosystemApp.java entity, (5) AppRegistrationRequest.java DTO, (6) EcosystemAppRepository.java, (7) EcosystemAppService.java, (8) EcosystemAppController.java. TDD order: write test first, confirm compilation error, implement code, confirm tests pass. Run 'mvn test -Dtest=EcosystemAppServiceTest' — all 4 tests must pass before committing. Commit message: 'feat(nexus-hub): app registry — register, list, deregister, heartbeat'. IMPORTANT: Do NOT modify pom.xml, application.yml, or any migration files. Do NOT create event or workflow classes.

tasks.title: Event Bus — EcosystemEvent, EventSubscription, EventBusService, TDD
tasks.jules_session_prompt: You are implementing the Nexus Hub event bus for the micro-saas ecosystem. The repo is Shashank2577/micro-saas. The complete implementation plan is in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md. Read it, then implement exactly Task 6: Event Bus AND Task 8 Step 1 (NexusHubConfig.java with RestTemplate bean). This includes: (1) EventBusServiceTest.java, (2) EcosystemEvent.java entity, (3) EcosystemEventRepository.java, (4) EventSubscription.java entity with matches() method, (5) EventSubscriptionRepository.java, (6) PublishEventRequest.java DTO, (7) SubscribeRequest.java DTO, (8) NexusHubConfig.java at nexus-hub/backend/src/main/java/com/microsaas/nexushub/config/NexusHubConfig.java (registers RestTemplate bean), (9) EventBusService.java, (10) EventBusController.java. TDD order per the plan. Run 'mvn test -Dtest=EventBusServiceTest' — all 4 tests must pass. Commit message: 'feat(nexus-hub): event bus — publish, subscribe, fan-out with wildcard patterns'. IMPORTANT: Do NOT modify EcosystemAppService, EcosystemApp, or migration files. Do NOT create workflow classes yet.

tasks.title: Workflow Engine — Workflow, WorkflowRun, WorkflowExecutor, TDD
tasks.jules_session_prompt: You are implementing the Nexus Hub workflow engine for the micro-saas ecosystem. The repo is Shashank2577/micro-saas. The complete implementation plan is in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md. Read it, then implement exactly Task 7: Workflow Engine. This includes: (1) WorkflowExecutorTest.java, (2) Workflow.java entity, (3) WorkflowRun.java entity, (4) WorkflowRepository.java, (5) WorkflowRunRepository.java, (6) CreateWorkflowRequest.java DTO, (7) WorkflowExecutor.java (the core logic — implements findMatchingWorkflows and execute), (8) WorkflowService.java, (9) WorkflowController.java. TDD order per the plan. Run 'mvn test -Dtest=WorkflowExecutorTest' — all 4 tests must pass. Run 'mvn test' — ALL tests (App Registry + Event Bus + Workflow) must pass. Commit message: 'feat(nexus-hub): workflow engine — create, trigger on events, execute steps'. IMPORTANT: Do NOT modify EventBusService yet (wiring comes in the next task). Do NOT modify migration files.
tasks.acceptance: All tests pass — Tests run: 12, Failures: 0, Errors: 0

phases.name: Wire + Full Smoke Test — Gemini after t7

tasks.title: Wire EventBusService to WorkflowExecutor + smoke test
tasks.gemini_command: cd /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas && gemini --yolo -p "@docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-15-ecosystem-foundation.md You are implementing the micro-saas ecosystem foundation. Execute ONLY Task 8 exactly as written. Working directory: /Users/shashanksaxena/Documents/Personal/Code/micro-saas. Steps: (1) Modify nexus-hub/backend/src/main/java/com/microsaas/nexushub/event/EventBusService.java — add WorkflowExecutor injection and update fanOutAsync exactly as shown in Task 8 Step 1. (2) Run 'cd nexus-hub/backend && mvn test -q' — all tests must pass. (3) Start the app: 'cd nexus-hub/backend && mvn spring-boot:run &' then sleep 15. (4) Smoke test register: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8090/api/v1/apps/register -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Tenant-ID: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001' -d '{\"name\":\"incidentbrain\",\"displayName\":\"IncidentBrain\",\"baseUrl\":\"https://api-incidentbrain.example.com\",\"manifest\":{}}' | python3 -m json.tool — expect JSON with id field. (5) Smoke test event: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8090/api/v1/events -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'X-Tenant-ID: 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001' -d '{\"sourceApp\":\"incidentbrain\",\"eventType\":\"incident.opened\",\"payload\":{\"incidentId\":\"abc123\"}}' | python3 -m json.tool. (6) pkill -f 'spring-boot:run'. (7) git add nexus-hub/backend/src/main/java/com/microsaas/nexushub/event/EventBusService.java && git commit -m 'feat(nexus-hub): wire event bus to workflow executor'. (8) git push origin main. Do NOT modify any other Java files."
tasks.acceptance: All mvn tests pass; smoke test returns JSON with id field; git push succeeds

review_focus.t5: Entity annotations correct (tenant schema), repository methods match usage in service, service transaction boundaries correct, controller uses TenantContext.require()
review_focus.t6: EventSubscription.matches() wildcard logic correct, fanOutAsync is truly async (@Async annotation present), RestTemplate bean registered in config, error handling in deliverToSubscriber swallows exceptions correctly
review_focus.t7: WorkflowExecutor.matchesTrigger() handles both exact and wildcard patterns correctly, execute() saves run before executing steps so partial runs are visible, RunStatus transitions are correct
